text.title: Agent Replay Harness Cookbook Decision Tree

root-question.text: Is the failure already captured in a trace with prompts, tool calls, clock, and seed?

question.text: Is every nondeterministic dependency stubbable (subclassable / wrappable)?
Does the replayed run reproduce the failure event bit-for-bit?

branch.conclusion: Adopt the cookbook. Emit manifest, commit replay tests.
Loop back to step 2 — there is a hidden nondeterministic source not yet captured.
Split — first instrument the missing dependency class, then re-enter at step 1.
Capture first. Don't attempt to stub something you haven't recorded; you'll fabricate values and waste a day.

example.p: Failure captured with coverage_ratio=0.97 → q1=true → q2=true → q3=true → conclusion: adopt-harness. Commit replay_llm.py + manifest.
